title: Merge k Sorted Lists
prompt: You are given an array of k sorted linked lists. Merge them into one sorted linked list and return it.
constraints: Each list is sorted in ascending order.
hints: A min-heap of k current heads picks the next smallest in O(log k).
Alternatively, pairwise merge in log k rounds (divide & conquer).
pitfalls: Comparator instability when values are equal — track list index to break ties safely.
Forgetting to push the next node when popping.
